title: Hendrix's Better Pale Garden
description: Boost the Pale Garden with White Pumpkins, new Resin Blocks and a new Structure!
body:
The Pale Garden is the first Biome added with the new Minecraft's Game Drops. It adds a new, unique, mob, the Creaking. A new wood set, the Pale Wood, and a new material, Resin. Overall these are good additions for such a small update, however something is missing... That's why this mod exists, to add the missing features players asked Mojang to add but never did 🌫️ ------------------------- ### 🌫️ Features #### FOG The first, obvious, feature that you'll find in the Pale Garden is the _**slightly requested**_ fog. A deep fog surrounds the Biome, increasing the overall mood of the Pale Garden #### WHITE PUMPKINS Around the Pale Garden you may find White Pumpkins. These acts like regular pumpkins, meaning that you can carve them or turn them into a light source, the **Soul o'Lantern**, using a Soul Torch instead of a regular Torch. Iron and Snow Golems can also be summoned using White Pumpkins! #### THORN BUSHES Scattered around the Pale Garden you may also find Thorn Bushes. These bushes damage any entity that walks inside them, like Sweet Berry Bushes, and can be crafted using Pale Hanging Moss and a Cactus Block #### WAXED CREAKING HEART Creaking Heart can now be waxed! This way you can use this Block in your buildings without the worrying of spawning a Creaking at night. #### CRACKED AND MOSSY RESIN BRICKS Cracked and Mossy Resin Bricks variants has been added to match other Bricks in the game. They can be crafted like regular cracked or mossy stone bricks #### CREAKED ARMOR TRIM SMITHING TEMPLATE AND HAUNTED HOUSE A new Smithing Template, unique to the Pale Garden, has been added: the Creaked Armor Trim! This new Smithing Template can be found in a new structure, the Haunted House, which also contains two Vex spawners. ------------------------- ### 👨🏼‍💻 How to contribute Anyone can contribute to Better Pale Garden, suggesting their ideas [using the Feature Request module](https://github.com/JimiIT92/BetterPaleGarden/issues/new?assignees=JimiIT92&labels=enhancement&template=feature_request.md&title=) If your idea makes it to the mod you'll also be mentioned in the mod's credits! 😁 ------------------------- ### ⚙ Requirements [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) is required for configuring the mod. Additionally, you can use [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to have a config GUI inside your game, however this is optional ------------------------- ### 🍺 Support the project Developing and maintaining Better Pale Garden, requires a lot of time and effort, but after all I really enjoy doing this ❤ Better Pale Garden is, and **always** will be, **FREE TO USE**. If someone asked you some money to download Better Pale Garden, I am afraid to tell you that you got scammed! 😥 But if you **really** want to financially support the project (or just buy me some beer to produce more code), these are the only ways:

     

Any other website asking you money for this project is a scam, and you should immediately report it to your local authorities as well! 😡 ------------------------- ### 😁 Conclusion The Pale Garden is conceptually a cool biome, and with this mod we can make it even better! I hope you enjoy Better Pale Garden as much as I enjoy develop new ideas and content for it, and let me know if there are any issues on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/JimiIT92/BetterPaleGarden/issues/new?assignees=JimiIT92&labels=enhancement&template=bug_report.md&title=). Have a nice day! 😁
